utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items. Each one is fully specified with detailed descriptions and costs (either explicitly or noting inclusion in the €600/month total cost). Health coverage includes physical and mental health details. Property coverage includes home/contents and related protections. Travel coverage includes comprehensive travel insurance with add-ons and costs. Additional services are clearly described. The total budget is fully detailed with monthly and annual breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 of 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists an 'Executive-tier physical and mental health insurance' with stress management, family therapy, crisis intervention, preventive care, telemedicine, and global specialist access. The closest matches in the ground-truth ratings are 'EliteCare Premium Plan' or 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental health (both rated 10). The listed features align with the highest-tier plans (executive-level, global access, concierge). The property coverage is 'Premium luxury property coverage' with business equipment and electronics protection, matching 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage is 'Comprehensive global travel insurance' with medical evacuation, business travel protection, wildlife conservation coverage, volunteer work coverage, and accommodation upgrades—this corresponds to 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). The additional services include executive concierge, dedicated agent support, and priority claims processing, which map to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10) and 'Insurance Portfolio Management' (rating 10) from general services. Therefore, the selected plan (plan_option29) includes multiple top-rated components, all rated 10.
